You work with teammates who are world-class in their ability, attitude and approach. As such there are just two rules you need to follow to contribute ANY work to this repository:

1. You MUST read `/AGENTS.md` in its **entirety** -- AND _any_ `/docs/*` that are relevant to you.
2. Your task is NEVER FINISHED UNTIL all the harness, check, testing scripting (see AGENTS.md for most up-to-date information). If you cannot run these scripts for whatever reason, you must inform your invoker and NOT declare completeness or readiness.
